title: PeakCraftTV
description: This mod pack is heavily optimized to boost fps to the max including some vanilla plus features.
body:
# This modpack is built for players who want smooth performance, stunning visuals, and quality-of-life improvements without straying far from the vanilla Minecraft experience.

⚡ Performance & Optimization

Sodium, Lithium, Krypton, FerriteCore, ModernFix, ImmediatelyFast, Noisium – Boost FPS, reduce lag, and optimize networking for buttery-smooth gameplay.

Bobby & Very Many Players – Load faraway chunks and handle servers with massive player counts.

🎨 Visual & Immersion Enhancements

Iris + Continuity + Enhanced Block Entities + LambDynamicLights + Sound Physics Remastered – Enjoy shaders, seamless connected textures, glowing lights, improved models, and immersive soundscapes.

Entity Model & Texture Features, More Culling, OptiGUI – Sharper details, better rendering, and a cleaner interface.

🛠️ Utility & QoL

Roughly Enough Items (REI), Shulker Box Tooltip, Veinminer, Tree Harvester, Sit, Mouse Tweaks, InvMove – Streamline crafting, inventory, and movement.

Xaero’s Minimap + Xaero’s World Map + XaeroPlus – Never lose your way again with powerful mapping tools.

WorldEdit – Build faster with advanced editing tools.

🔒 Safety & Accessibility

No Chat Reports + No Resource Pack Warnings – Play safely and without unnecessary restrictions.

Cherished Worlds + Clean F3 + Mod Menu – Better world management, cleaner HUD, and easy mod configuration.

✨ Extra Flavor

Silk (all modules), Resourcify, Variants CIT – Expand customization options with flexible resource management and cosmetic tweaks.

PatPat, Essential mod - Personalize your player experience with skins, capes, and fun emotes.

✅ Perfect for: Players who want optimized performance, shader-ready visuals, handy tools, and a lightweight vanilla+ feel with some building and multiplayer support.
